issues.description: Power boost duration should be 'DuringThisBattle' not 'EndOfBattle' for counter effects during battle
Extraneous second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and Rest action. The DSL should contain only one Counter effect; the second Trigger effect is not supported by the card text
Rest action target should include maxCost constraint in scope definition for clarity, though implementation may infer from maxCost field
